title: Supporting information for "Reproducible protocol for the extraction and semi-automated quantification of macroscopic charcoal from soil"
author: Ruiz-Pérez, Javier
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This repository contains supporting information for the paper "Reproducible protocol for the extraction and semi-automated quantification of macroscopic charcoal from soil" by Javier Ruiz-Pérez, Julie C. Aleman, and Joseph W. Veldman (PLOS ONE, 2024), which is available at  https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0304198 . 
   
  CAPTIONS  
  Appendix S1. Methodology for assessing reporting practices of charcoal methods.  This file describes the methodology that we used to assess the reporting practices of extraction and analysis methods of charcoal fragments from soil or sediment samples in 100 publications. 
  Appendix S2. Description of soil samples.  This file provides information on the soil samples that we used to test and validate the protocol. 
  Dataset S1. Charcoal images.  This file contains 463 JPG images taken under a light stereo microscope of the extracted charcoal from 100 soil samples along with an empty image with a scale bar. 
  Dataset S2. Raw results from ImageJ.  Output files generated by the ImageJ macro of the protocol with the images from Dataset S1. 
  File S1. Raw data of the results of the assessment.  This file includes the year of publication, DOI, and full reference of 100 publications assessed according to the nine variables defined in Appendix S1. 
  File S2. Raw data of the extraction weights.  This file includes the dry weight of the initial soil sample and the dry weight of the extracted charcoal fragments from 100 soil samples. 
  File S3. Counting results.  This file contains the number of charcoal fragments obtained from Dataset S1 using the ImageJ macro of the protocol. 
  File S4. Measurements results.  This file contains the measurements of charcoal fragments (i.e., area, length, and width) obtained from Dataset S1 using the ImageJ macro of the protocol. 
  File S5. Validation data.  This file contains the results of manual quantification of 100 charcoal fragments together with the measurements obtained automatically with the ImageJ macro of the protocol. 
  Metadata S1. Metadata associated with File S1.  
  Metadata S2. Metadata associated with File S2.  
  Metadata S3. Metadata associated with File S3.  
  Metadata S4. Metadata associated with File S4.  
  Metadata S5. Metadata associated with File S5.
